metadata.title: Virtual Linker / Glossary
metadata.description: Automatically creates virtual links for text within your notes that match the titles or aliases of other notes in your vault. Create a glossary-like functionality, show unlinked mentions and transform them to real links.

regex.target: .setName("排除指向真实链接文件的链接")

regex.source: .setName("Capital letter percentage for automatic match case")
regex.target: .setName("自动匹配情况的大写字母百分比")
.setName("生成虚拟链接时排除的目录")

regex.source: .setDesc("If activated, the virtual linker will also include aliases for the files.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果激活，虚拟链接器也将包含文件的别名。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If activated, there will not be several identical virtual links in the same note (Wikipedia style).")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果激活，在同一笔记中不会出现多个相同的虚拟链接（维基百科风格）。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If activated, there will be no links to files that are already linked in the note by real links.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果激活，将不会链接已经通过真实链接在笔记中链接的文件。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If activated, headers (so your lines beginning with at least one `#`) are included for virtual links.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果激活，包含标题（即以至少一个`#`开始的行）用于虚拟链接。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If activated, only whole words are matched. Otherwise, every part of a word is found.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果激活，仅匹配整个单词。否则，会找到单词的每个部分。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If activated, the beginnings of words are also linked, even if it is not a whole match.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果激活，单词的开头也会被链接，即使它不是一个完整的匹配。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If activated, the suffix is not added to links for subwords, but only for complete matches.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果激活，子单词的链接不会添加后缀，而仅对完整匹配添加。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If activated, there will be no links in the current line.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果激活，当前行中不会有链接。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If activated, the matching is case sensitive.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果激活，匹配是区分大小写的。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The percentage (0 - 100) of capital letters in a file name or alias to be automatically considered as case sensitive.")
regex.target: .setDesc("文件名或别名中大写字母的百分比（0-100），将自动被视为区分大小写。")

regex.source: .setDesc("By adding this tag to a file, the linker will ignore the case for the file.")
regex.target: .setDesc("通过向文件添加此标签，链接器将忽略文件的大小写。")

regex.source: .setDesc("By adding this tag to a file, the linker will match the case for the file.")
regex.target: .setDesc("通过向文件添加此标签，链接器将匹配文件的大小写。")

regex.source: .setDesc("By adding this property to a note, containing a list of names, the linker will ignore the case for the specified names / aliases. This way you can decide, which alias should be insensitive.")
regex.target: .setDesc("通过向笔记中添加此属性，包含名字列表，链接器将忽略指定的名字/别名的大小写。这样你可以决定哪些别名应不区分大小写。")

regex.source: .setDesc("By adding this property to a note, containing a list of names, the linker will match the case for the specified names / aliases. This way you can decide, which alias should be case sensitive.")
regex.target: .setDesc("通过向笔记中添加此属性，包含名字列表，链接器将匹配指定的名字/别名的大小写。这样你可以决定哪些别名应区分大小写。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Include all files for the virtual linker.")
regex.target: .setDesc("包含所有文件供虚拟链接器使用。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Directories to include for the virtual linker (separated by new lines).")
regex.target: .setDesc("包含供虚拟链接器使用的目录（由换行符分隔）。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Directories from which files are to be excluded for the virtual linker (separated by new lines). Files in these directories will not create any virtual links in other files.")
regex.target: .setDesc("从这些目录排除供虚拟链接器使用的文件（由换行符分隔）。这些目录中的文件不会在其他文件中创建任何虚拟链接。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Tag to explicitly include the file for the linker.")
regex.target: .setDesc("标签以明确地包括文件供链接器使用。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Tag to ignore the file for the linker.")
regex.target: .setDesc("标签以忽略文件供链接器使用。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If toggled, links to the note itself are excluded from the linker. (This might not work in preview windows.)")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果切换，链接到笔记本身的链接将从链接器中排除。（这可能在预览窗口中不起作用。）")

regex.source: .setDesc("Directories in which the plugin will not create virtual links (separated by new lines).")
regex.target: .setDesc("插件不会创建虚拟链接的目录（由换行符分隔）。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The suffix to add to auto generated virtual links.")
regex.target: .setDesc("要添加到自动生成的虚拟链接的后缀。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The suffix to add to auto generated virtual links for aliases.")
regex.target: .setDesc("要添加到为别名自动生成的虚拟链接的后缀。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If toggled, the default link styling will be applied to virtual links. Furthermore, you can style the links yourself with a CSS-snippet affecting the class `virtual-link`. (Find the CSS snippet directory at Appearance -> CSS Snippets -> Open snippets folder)")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果切换，将默认链接样式应用于虚拟链接。此外，您可以使用影响`virtual-link`类的CSS片段来自定义链接样式。（在外观 -> CSS片段 -> 打开片段文件夹中查找CSS片段目录）")

regex.source: .setDesc("If toggled, the default link style will be used for the conversion of virtual links to real links.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果切换，默认链接样式将用于将虚拟链接转换为真实链接。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If toggled, the virtual links will be created as wiki-links instead of markdown links.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果切换，虚拟链接将以维基链接而不是Markdown链接的形式创建。")

regex.source: .setPlaceholder("List of directory names (separated by new line)")
regex.target: .setPlaceholder("目录名称列表（由换行符分隔）")
